message: Synthetic partial-view fixture intentionally omits board coverage.
Matched fiducial points cover a narrow board area; partial-view fit may be fragile.
Radial distortion fit is not trustworthy with this narrow fiducial coverage.
31 board marker IDs are not visible or accepted.
